title: Inventory of recycling programs in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Inventory of recycling programs in Canada
The Recycling Program Inventory offers links to extended producer responsibility programs, product stewardship initiatives, and related efforts across Canada. You can explore the inventory by product category, by region, or by entering keywords in the search bar.
- The inventory provides links to websites of external organizations that are not subject to the Official Languages Act . The content is therefore in the language(s) used by the organization in question.
- The inventory does not constitute Environment and Climate Change Canada’s endorsement of the programs and services listed.
- Please submit new information or corrections to help us continually improve the inventory.

## Inventory of Recycling Programs in Canada
91 results out of 91
